commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Gateway chat abort markers from timestamp-only presence checks to ordered markers and stamps chat run registrations so stale markers do not suppress fresh chat projections.

PR surface: Source +74, Tests +81. Total +155 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main only tests abort-marker presence in server-chat.ts, so a retained same-key marker can suppress fresh chat delta/final projection; the PR body also reports a red current-main regression for that case.
